resources.label: Check Schedule
resources.instruction: Start a new chat in ChatGPT. Copy and paste this prompt:
resources.content:
What does my schedule look like tomorrow?
List every event - title, time, and how long each one is.

resources.label: Find a Free Slot
resources.instruction: In the same chat, copy and paste this prompt:
resources.content:
Look at my calendar for the next 2 weeks.
Is there any 3-hour block where I am completely free?
Tell me the first one you find - date, day, and exact time.

resources.label: Send the Heist Invite
resources.instruction: Replace [PARTNER EMAIL] with your partner's actual email address. Copy and paste this prompt:
resources.content:
Look at my calendar for the next 2 weeks.
Find the first 3-hour slot where I am completely free.

Schedule a meeting at that time with [PARTNER EMAIL].

Title: Operation: Steal the Sun - Mission Planning Session
Duration: 3 hours

Send them a calendar invite with this agenda:

---
Hi,

You're being recruited for the most ambitious heist in history.

We are planning Operation: Steal the Sun. The data has been analysed.
The plan is ready. Now we need a crew.

What the data told us:
- Best time to go: [your answer from Q1]
- Ship we're taking: [your answer from Q2]
- Team size: [your answer from Q3]
- Budget we need: [your answer from Q4]
- Biggest risk - and how we avoid it: [your answer from Q5]

Our secret weapon: [your special tool from Level 2]

What we're deciding in this session:
- Who does what on the team
- How we present this to GRU
- Final sign-off before execution day

Come ready to commit.

- [Your name], Chief Strategist, Gru Industries
---

Confirm once the invite is sent.
resources.note: Your Minion will read your calendar, find a free slot, create the invite, and send it - all from one instruction.
